description_long: This is a weathered, rectangular self-service payment kiosk or terminal, primarily colored in faded mint green and off-white, with visible rust, grime, and graffiti on its surfaces. The front face features a recessed panel with a Japanese label, several slots and compartments for payment and dispensing, and a small display area. The sides are relatively flat, also marked with graffiti and some minor text, while the back is plain and unadorned. The kiosk appears to be constructed mainly from metal, with some plastic or glass components for the display and interface areas. The overall appearance suggests it has been exposed to outdoor urban environments for an extended period. Its robust build and utilitarian design indicate it is intended for public use, likely for transactions such as ticketing or bill payments.
description: A weathered, mint green and off-white self-service payment kiosk with graffiti, rust, and multiple payment slots on the front. It features a small display and is designed for public urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main interface, including a display, payment slots, Japanese signage, and heavy graffiti.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying graffiti, minor text, and the flat side panel with no interactive features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, mint green surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view with additional graffiti and a flat panel, similar to the left side.
attribute_display_screen: A small rectangular display screen is present on the upper front panel, slightly recessed with a thin bezel, showing faint interface elements.
attribute_payment_interface: Multiple payment interfaces are visible on the front, including two rectangular slots (likely for cash or cards) and a possible keypad area, all located below the display.
attribute_branding_or_logo: No clear corporate branding or logo is visible; only Japanese text and graffiti are present.
attribute_instructional_signage: Japanese text signage is present above the display and on the sides, printed directly onto the surface in a simple style.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: A small horizontal slot below the main payment area on the front likely serves as a receipt dispenser, accessible and rectangular in shape.
